guestSubtitle: Try a little of what we offer.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.createFreeAccountDesc: Start now and save your progress

tip.guestText: Recruiters spend an average of 6 seconds per resume. Your quiz results generate a verifiable portfolio that catches attention.
tip.userText: Review your mistakes from previous quizzes. Users who review mistakes are 40% more likely to pass.

guestHero.description: Tech, Healthcare, Sales, Law, Engineering... TreinaVaga uses AI to create personalized quizzes for your reality, whatever it may be.

guestFeatures.title: What you'll find here
guestFeatures.aiQuizzesDesc: Generate personalized quizzes based on job descriptions in seconds. Prepare for what really matters.
guestFeatures.interviewSimDesc: Practice with an AI that simulates real recruiters. Get instant feedback on your answers.
guestFeatures.flashcardsSRSDesc: Long-term memorization with spaced repetition. Never forget important concepts again.

lockedPanel.title: Progress Dashboard
lockedPanel.description: Access detailed charts, error history, and receive insights to accelerate your success.
